description.description: The description of the ledger account statement.

ledger_account_id.description: The id of the ledger account whose ledger entries are queried against, and its balances are computed as a result.

effective_at_lower_bound.description: The inclusive lower bound of the effective_at timestamp of the ledger entries to be included in the ledger account statement.

effective_at_upper_bound.description: The exclusive upper bound of the effective_at timestamp of the ledger entries to be included in the ledger account statement.

metadata.description: Additional data represented as key-value pairs. Both the key and value must be strings.
